items.name: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service Anywhere (Amazon EKS Anywhere)
items.description: Amazon EKS Anywhere is a new deployment option for Amazon EKS that allows customers to create and operate Kubernetes clusters on customer-managed infrastructure, supported by AWS.

items.name: Cybozu Kubernetes Engine
items.description: Cybozu Kubernetes Engine, a distributed service that automates Kubernetes cluster management.

items.name: Gardener
items.description: The Gardener implements automated management and operation of Kubernetes clusters as a service and aims to support that service on multiple  Cloud providers.

items.name: kind
items.description: kind creates local multi-node Kubernetes clusters using Docker container nodes.

items.name: kOps
items.description: kOps is open-source, community-maintained tooling for production-grade Kubernetes cluster installation, management and upgrades.

items.name: Kubeasz
items.description: Kubeasz is a tool to deploy a Production Ready Kubernetes Cluster with ansible playbooks.

items.name: Kubeaver
items.description: Deploy a highly available Kubernetes cluster in offline environments.

items.name: KubeClipper
items.description: Manage kubernetes in the most light and convenient way.

items.name: Kubekey
items.description: Kubekey provides a flexible, rapid and convenient way to install Kubernetes only, both Kubernetes and KubeSphere, and related cloud-native add-ons.  It is also an efficient tool to scale and upgrade your cluster.

items.name: KubeOps
items.description: KubeOps Platform involves all the activities required to run, manage and maintain Kubernetes clusters in production environments, including our best practices, self-deployed tools, and strategies.

items.name: Kubermatic KubeOne
items.description: Lifecycle management tool for Highly-Available Kubernetes clusters on any infrastructure

items.name: Kubernetes - The Easier Way
items.description: Kubernetes - The Easier Way enables users to create and manage an easily customizable HA Kubernetes cluster with only a couple of commands

items.name: Kubespray
items.description: Deploy a Production Ready Kubernetes Cluster

items.name: kwok
items.description: Kubernetes WithOut Kubelet - Simulates thousands of Nodes and Clusters.

items.name: minikube
items.description: minikube runs a local Kubernetes cluster on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

items.name: NKD - NestOS Kubernetes Deployer
items.description: NKD (NestOS Kubernetes Deployer) is a solution specially built for deploying and maintaining Kubernetes clusters on NestOS. Its design goal is to provide a convenient cluster operation experience, allowing users to easily complete complex management tasks, thereby improving the efficiency of overall deployment and maintenance.

items.name: OpenNebula Kubernetes Engine
items.description: Virtual Appliance for KVM with preinstalled Kubernetes service is available from OpenNebula's Public Marketplace.

items.name: Sidero Talos Linux
items.description: Talos Linux is Linux designed for Kubernetes - secure, immutable, and minimal.
